title: libanotis seseloides
intro: Libanotis seseloides, also known as sea holly or false sea holly, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Libanotis seseloides include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and soothe digestive issues.
